# Optional Dependencies

This scenario demonstrates optional dependencies.

#### Dependency Graph
```{mermaid}
%%| fig-width: 4.4
graph LR
    Root[Project Root] --> LibA["lib-a:1.0.0 (Optional)"]
```

#### SBT (build.sbt)

```{.scala include="/demos/sbt-demo/scenario-8-optional/build.sbt" snippet="s8-deps"}
```

#### Expected Intuition
Not transitive.

#### Actual Resolution Results
Respects optional.

#### Classpath Reality
Not transitive.

#### Why This Happens
Ivy metadata.

#### How Developers Commonly "Fix" This
N/A

#### Safer Ways to Take Control
N/A

#### Signals to Watch For
N/A

#### How This Scales in Real Systems
N/A

#### Key Takeaway
Optional works.

#### Related Scenarios
N/A
